mapper.insert: insert into book (title, author, isbn, category_id, price, stock, publisher, publish_date, description, cover_url, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) values (#{title}, #{author}, #{isbn}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{publisher}, #{publishDate}, #{description}, #{coverUrl}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.select:
select * from book
and status = 1 and is_deleted = 0
and (title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or author like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and category_id = #{categoryId}
order by
updated_at desc price asc price desc sales desc created_at desc
select id, title, author, isbn, category_id, price, stock, publisher, publish_date, description, cover_url, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from book where id = #{id}
mapper.update:
update book
title = #{title},
author = #{author},
isbn = #{isbn},
category_id = #{categoryId},
price = #{price},
stock = #{stock},
publisher = #{publisher},
publish_date = #{publishDate},
description = #{description},
cover_url = #{coverUrl},
where id = #{id}
